subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Hearken unto that which God calleth thee from this Most Holy Station. Say: By God, verily the Spirit hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا جواد فاسمع ما ینادیک الله فیهذا المقام الاطهر قل تالله ان الروح قد ظهر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
